title: Hazel Crystal Optimizer - HCO
description: Proven fastest Crystal PvP optimizer after dozens of tests. Zero delay on any ping - crystals at inhuman speeds. Simply the best optimizer available
body:
Hazel Crystal Optimizer - HCO

After dozens of tests, HCO is proven to be the fastest Crystal PvP optimizer ever created. Zero delay, zero cooldown - crystals explode instantly regardless of your ping. This optimizer crystals so fast that no human can match its speed.

5 speed levels from Careful to Extreme. Level 1 for maximum compatibility, Level 5 for pure performance. Hold to place, hold to break, crystal while doing anything.

Simply the best crystal optimizer available.

Press H for GUI • /hazel for commands

Created by HazelBlade_
